evaluators.name: Evening High-Scare Maze Tickets with Cheapest Timeslot and Promo Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user bought 4+ tickets for a high-scare, non–kid-friendly maze on Oct 29 using the cheapest available timeslot after 6 PM, applied a valid ticket promo, and viewed checkout.

evaluators.name: 3-Item Zombie Apparel Bundle with Venue Pickup Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added at least 3 distinct zombie-themed apparel items priced at $25 or less with rating ≥4 to the cart and set merch delivery to pick up at the event venue.

evaluators.name: Halloween Maze and Escape Room Group Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked 4+ tickets for a high-scare maze after 8 PM and 4+ tickets for a high-scare escape room after 9 PM on Oct 31, and viewed the cart.

evaluators.name: Three-Event Evening Night Plan on Oct 30 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added at least 3 different events between 5 PM and 10 PM on Oct 30 to their night plan and viewed the night plan page.

evaluators.name: Five Kid-Friendly Low-Scare Favorites Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the first five favorites are kid-friendly attractions with scare level 1–3 and age rating all_ages or ten_plus, and that the favorites list was viewed.

evaluators.name: VIP Escape Room Earliest Pre-7PM with Photo/Video Add-On Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user reserved a VIP session for 2+ players at a high-scare escape room on Nov 1 using the earliest timeslot before 7 PM, included a photo/video add-on, and viewed checkout.

evaluators.name: Nearest Arena Parking Pass at 7 PM on Oct 31 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added a single parking pass for Oct 31 at 7:00 PM for the nearest parking area within 500 m of the main arena with correct pricing.

evaluators.name: Earliest Free Family Zombie Makeup Workshop Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered a party of 3 for the earliest free, family-friendly zombie makeup workshop between Oct 28–30, 1–4 PM, using the specified contact details.
